summary: Lead accepts M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 after simulation_engineer R2 REVIEW and systems_architect R2 ACCEPT. The implementation adds deterministic authoritative M6 diplomacy and legitimacy substrate, preserves manual-node-battle deferral, keeps player/AI command parity, and remains within allowed sim/protocol/save/test/process paths.

tests_run.result: PASS per writer/reviewer evidence; 24 files / 179 tests including M6 authority and obligation reasoning coverage.
PASS per writer/reviewer evidence; M6 AI uses command actor kind ai with id polity:<actorPolityId>.
PASS per writer/reviewer evidence; root 37 files / 259 tests and web 4 tests.
VALID before lead ACCEPT update; final validation is run after this handoff is written.
No whitespace errors before lead ACCEPT update.

decisions: ACCEPT: previous P1 actor-authority issue is fixed for diplomacy proposal, diplomacy answer, and legitimacy-source recording.
ACCEPT: M6 AI command parity is preserved with actor kind ai and polity:<id> actor id convention through the shared GameCommand path.
ACCEPT: recognized-order obligation clear/risk/blocked state now derives from actual M3 obligation status/accounting and blocks victory pursuit when risk/blocked.
ACCEPT: M6 diplomacy/legitimacy state is authoritative in sim-core with schemaVersion 1, stable IDs, deterministic ordering/tie-breakers, and reason-coded events/deltas.
ACCEPT: save/protocol changes are additive/versioned and covered by save/load, protocol, malformed/missing/future-version rejection tests.
No forbidden UI, desktop, content, docs gate, roadmap, acceptance-matrix, PROJECT_STATUS, server, telemetry, arbitrary scripting, full peace UI, or manual node battle scope was added.
Proceed to PR integration; task becomes CLOSED only after accepted changes enter main.
risks: Untracked ui-samples/ remains in the worktree and is unrelated; it is intentionally unstaged and untouched.
Future M6 integrations should extend legitimacy-source authority by reviewed domain commands instead of broadening the allowlist implicitly.
Protocol package has no typecheck script; reviewer classified this as script absence rather than a TypeScript diagnostic.
requested_action: Run final lead integration gates, open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 CLOSED and continue to the next READY M6 task.
